items.name_cn:
Olive Calfskin with Cotton Linen
24ss New Shopping Bag
A unique fusion of art and personality. Y always has a unique vision, winning the hearts of top fashion trends. The Y-shaped calfskin design is eye-catching, giving a casual, lazy, yet full-of-personality vibe. Extra-large capacity, fits iPads and laptops. Retro minimalist design, great for posing, stylish and photogenic!
Model: 817602
Dimensions: 38-50×33×16cm

items.name_cn:
Lucky Bag Woven Bag 🏖️
Best-seller alert! Jamie's Lucky Bag is updated with raffia material. This bag is chillier than the lambskin, full of vacation vibes. Incredible capacity! Fits sunscreen, sunglasses, and straw hats. Unique woven texture, recording the warmth of the sun. Every photo radiates leisure and comfort!
Model No.: 833948
Size: 27×29×11cm

[Highest version original factory leather top-tier original set with full counter packaging] 25c Kelly Lamb Skin
Fashion is a cycle, the big hot vintage Kelly is re-designed by Chanel to bring it back to life. Vintage Kelly is famous for its classic handle handbag, adding a leather chain shoulder strap to the base to subvert tradition, making it more casual and convenient
Model: AS4416
Size: 13-19-7

items.name_cn:
Dumpling Bag in Stock!!️
Miss Caro Wine Palm Straw Series, feels so summery. Sky blue fabric paired with creamy white calfskin. Light colors look fresh and healing. Lucky for those who love shoulder bags. Small and simple shape, paired with classic oblique fabric and vintage gold letters. Stylish and exquisite. Super lightweight for personal use, full capacity to store daily items. Comes with an adjustable leather shoulder strap, can be worn elegantly over the shoulder or carried by hand
size:24*6.5*14cm

items.name_cn:
Sweet Pink in Stock!!️
Lady Diana Three-Compartment Limited Edition with Diamond Clasp, it looks so good. Brand new crystal letter diamond clasp, full of luxury. Who can refuse a bling bling Diana bag. Purely hand-set crystal letter clasp, full of exquisite details. Paired with classic quilted pattern and high-quality sheepskin. Charming, elegant, and full of presence. Can be worn crossbody or carried by hand, very feminine. Classic and stylish style, don't miss it
size:17*7*15cm

items.name_en: Genuine leather, in stock 25A Suede bag|
items.name_cn:
Genuine leather, in stock 25A Suede bag|
New arrival of the 25A series, this suede and leather patch bag is a god-tier design! High-quality suede meets smooth calfskin, texture is maxed out. Quilted pattern + classic double C logo, low-key luxury!!️ Suede × glossy leather, the layering is amazing! Distressed gold chain is adjustable, shoulder/ crossbody/clutch in one bag! Fits phone + lipstick + compact, practical and structured! Versatile and suits everyone! size: 35*24*12cm
